title: Non-revenue Water | Siemens
body: REAL-WORLD APPLICATION Reduce non-revenue water by up to 50% Find new cost savings for your utility with smart leak detection, data analytics and meter management powered by artificial intelligence. Gain accurate, reliable insights into your operations to support decision making and efficiency. Contact us IFAT 2026 Visit us on IFAT 2026 from May 4-7 Master the digital wave for resilient, efficient and sustainable water. More details about IFAT Challenge Real losses due to leakage and apparent losses due to inaccurate meters threaten your bottom line. Even a small reduction in non-revenue water can mean thousands of cubic meters in saved water and significant cost savings. Solution Capture more revenue from your utilities with our AI-based applications: SIWA Leak Finder, SIWA Meter Data Analytics and SIWA Meter Data Management. Used together, they demonstrate the full potential for reducing water loss. Unlock significant cost savings It’s not just water loss that’s costing you —inefficient processes and unhappy customers also affect your bottom line. With our smart leak detection and meter analytics and management solutions, you can: Make the most of your existing investments Detect leaks faster and more accurately Mitigate water loss—and customer frustration Detect hardware failures, faulty meters, negative consumption and unauthorized water extraction Improve productivity Get an excellent return on investment Cloud-based flexibility Analyze real-time flow data using flexible cloud computing, artificial intelligence and hydraulic modeling to identify leaks and anomalies. Reliable data Collect, analyze and visualize data from smart water meters to provide transparent and reliable insights into meter performance and customer-side leaks. Powerful analytics Effectively reduce water losses through the application of powerful, proprietary data analytics to granular smart meter data. Case Study VA SYD Artificial intelligence: Saving water the smart way Results : SIWA Leak Finder allowed this Swedish water supplier to: Use its existing flowmeters and smart meters Detect leaks as small as 0.5 liters per second Decrease non-revenue water from 10% to 8% Scale up the solution to other parts of the network Work toward its goal of becoming a climate-neutral, energy-saving water utility Have any questions? Let's chat. Reach out and we will help you figure out the best place to start. Contact us
